//===== rAthena Script =======================================
//= Costume Capsule
//===== Description: =========================================
//= 100,000 Zeny per random costume draw.
//============================================================

prontera,172,180,4	script	Costume Capsule#EA	99,{
	mes "[Costume Capsule]";
	mes "Each draw costs 100,000 Zeny and awards one random costume.";
	mes "Duplicate results are possible.";
	next;
	.@choice = select("All costumes:Upper head:Middle head:Lower head:Garments:Multi-slot / other:Close");
	if (.@choice == 7)
		close;

	.@price = 100000;
	switch (.@choice) {
	case 1:
		.@item = .CAll[rand(getarraysize(.CAll))];
		break;
	case 2:
		.@item = .CUpper[rand(getarraysize(.CUpper))];
		break;
	case 3:
		.@item = .CMiddle[rand(getarraysize(.CMiddle))];
		break;
	case 4:
		.@item = .CLower[rand(getarraysize(.CLower))];
		break;
	case 5:
		.@item = .CGarment[rand(getarraysize(.CGarment))];
		break;
	case 6:
		.@item = .CMulti[rand(getarraysize(.CMulti))];
		break;
	}

	if (Zeny < .@price) {
		mes "[Costume Capsule]";
		mes "You need 100,000 Zeny.";
		close;
	}

	if (!checkweight(.@item,1)) {
		mes "[Costume Capsule]";
		mes "Your inventory is full or too heavy.";
		close;
	}

	Zeny -= .@price;
	getitem .@item,1;
	logmes "[EA_COSTUME] aid="+getcharid(3)+" cid="+getcharid(0)+" item="+.@item+" price="+.@price;
	mes "[Costume Capsule]";
	mes "You received ^0055FF"+getitemname(.@item)+"^000000.";
	close;

OnInit:
	setarray .CAll[0],5909,5911,5912,5913,5914,5915,5977,5979,5980,5981,15825,15836,15838,15839,15840,15841,15842,15843,15844,15846,15847,15851,15853,15854,15858,15875,15876,15877,15881,15882,15888,15889,15890,15893,15894,15899,15904,15905,15925,15926,15952,15953,15954,18740,18741,18742,18743,18744,18921,19015,19158,19287,19288,19289,19290,19291,19292,19293,19294,19403,19424,19459,19464,19466,19472,19500,19501,19502,19503,19504,19505,19506,19507,19508,19509,19510,19511,19512,19513,19514;
	setarray .CAll[80],19515,19516,19517,19518,19519,19520,19521,19522,19523,19524,19525,19526,19527,19528,19529,19530,19531,19532,19533,19534,19535,19536,19537,19538,19539,19540,19541,19542,19543,19544,19545,19546,19547,19548,19549,19550,19551,19552,19553,19554,19555,19556,19557,19558,19559,19560,19561,19562,19563,19564,19565,19566,19567,19568,19569,19570,19571,19572,19573,19574,19575,19576,19577,19578,19579,19580,19581,19582,19583,19584,19585,19586,19587,19588,19589,19590,19591,19592,19593,19594;
	setarray .CAll[160],19595,19596,19597,19598,19599,19600,19601,19602,19603,19604,19605,19606,19607,19608,19609,19610,19611,19612,19613,19614,19615,19616,19617,19618,19619,19620,19621,19622,19623,19624,19625,19626,19627,19628,19629,19630,19631,19632,19633,19634,19635,19636,19637,19638,19639,19640,19641,19642,19643,19644,19645,19646,19647,19648,19649,19650,19651,19652,19653,19654,19655,19656,19657,19658,19659,19660,19661,19662,19663,19664,19665,19666,19667,19668,19669,19670,19671,19672,19673,19674;
	setarray .CAll[240],19675,19676,19677,19678,19679,19680,19681,19682,19683,19684,19685,19687,19688,19689,19690,19691,19692,19693,19694,19695,19696,19697,19698,19699,19700,19702,19703,19704,19705,19706,19707,19708,19709,19710,19711,19712,19713,19714,19715,19716,19717,19718,19719,19720,19721,19722,19723,19724,19725,19726,19727,19728,19729,19730,19731,19732,19733,19734,19735,19736,19737,19738,19739,19740,19741,19742,19743,19744,19745,19746,19747,19748,19749,19750,19751,19752,19753,19754,19755,19756;
	setarray .CAll[320],19757,19758,19759,19760,19761,19762,19763,19764,19765,19766,19767,19768,19769,19770,19771,19772,19773,19774,19775,19776,19777,19778,19779,19780,19781,19782,19783,19784,19785,19786,19787,19788,19789,19790,19791,19792,19793,19794,19795,19796,19797,19798,19799,19800,19801,19802,19803,19804,19805,19806,19807,19808,19809,19810,19811,19812,19813,19814,19815,19816,19817,19818,19819,19820,19821,19822,19823,19824,19825,19826,19827,19828,19829,19830,19831,19832,19833,19834,19835,19836;
	setarray .CAll[400],19837,19838,19839,19840,19841,19842,19843,19844,19845,19846,19847,19848,19849,19850,19851,19852,19854,19855,19856,19857,19858,19859,19860,19861,19862,19863,19864,19865,19866,19867,19868,19869,19870,19871,19872,19873,19874,19875,19876,19877,19878,19879,19880,19881,19882,19883,19884,19885,19886,19887,19888,19889,19890,19891,19892,19893,19894,19895,19896,19897,19898,19899,19900,19901,19902,19903,19904,19905,19906,19907,19908,19909,19910,19911,19912,19913,19915,19916,19917,19918;
	setarray .CAll[480],19919,19920,19921,19922,19923,19924,19925,19926,19927,19928,19929,19930,19931,19932,19933,19934,19935,19936,19937,19938,19939,19940,19941,19942,19943,19944,19945,19946,19947,19948,19949,19950,19951,19952,19953,19954,19955,19956,19957,19958,19959,19960,19975,19977,19978,19979,19980,19981,19982,19983,19984,19985,19986,19987,19988,19989,19990,19991,19992,19993,19994,19995,19996,19997,19998,19999,20000,20001,20002,20003,20004,20005,20006,20007,20008,20009,20010,20011,20012,20013;
